pi_items.source: Checked export_result.sh which explicitly checks this path.
A spatial join using geopandas between ne_110m_populated_places and ne_110m_admin_0_countries (CONTINENT='Africa') yields exactly 57 cities.
A spatial join using geopandas yields exactly 57 cities. The task's claimed max_features of 55 is therefore incorrect and will cause a correct solution to fail the verifier.
Calculated the exact bounding box of African countries in the ne_110m_admin_0_countries.shp dataset using geopandas.
Verified via spatial join script that these specific cities exist in the dataset and correctly intersect with African continent polygons.
Verified via script that these cities exist in the dataset but do not intersect with African continent polygons.

privileged_info_summary: The task requires spatially selecting cities in Africa from the Natural Earth 1:110m dataset. An independent spatial join using geopandas reveals there are exactly 57 cities in the ne_110m_populated_places dataset that intersect with the African countries in ne_110m_admin_0_countries. The task description's estimate of ~30-40 features and the verifier's max_features threshold of 55 are factually incorrect; a perfect agent trajectory will extract 57 features and paradoxically fail the verifier's feature count check. The exact bounding box for African countries in this dataset is [-17.625, -34.819, 51.134, 37.350]. The expected output path, required cities, and forbidden cities are all correct.
